title: carduus galactites
intro: Carduus galactites, also known as Milk Thistle Knapweed or Buttercup, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and liver problems due to its silymarin content, which is known for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Carduus galactites include its potential to protect the liver from damage, support the immune system, and aid in the reduction of inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or the leaves and flowers are made into a tincture to be used in traditional medicine.
